dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) 2011-2012

pi_items.verified_value: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) 2011-2012
pi_items.source: setup_librehealth.sh lines 5, 58, 59-60 reference NHANES dataset; install_librehealth.sh line 4 confirms 'Uses NHANES real patient data from the official lh-ehr repository'

CDC NHANES 2011-2012 Official Overview (https://wwwn.cdc.gov/Nchs/Nhanes/ContinuousNhanes/Overview.aspx?BeginYear=2011) states 9,338 examined and 9,756 completed interview. The 9,375 figure in the task is close to these official numbers but represents a subset or specific selection from the NHANES 2011-2012 data.

setup_librehealth.sh line 5 explicitly states 'real National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey data from LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr'. Web search confirmed NHANES data is 'real US patient data, not synthetic data' from official CDC sources.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) 2011-2012 patient data, containing approximately 9,375 de-identified real US patient records from the CDC. Credentials are admin/password. The export output is written to /home/ga/Documents/Transfer/export.xml. The patient to export is dynamically selected from the database at task startup and specified in /home/ga/Desktop/transfer_request.txt.
